name: Input
description: Styled text input with label, prefix/suffix, icons, error state.

api.name: Input
api.description: Styled text input with label, prefix/suffix, icons, error state.

parameters.name: ShowCount
parameters.description: Renders a character counter below the input, matching Textarea's pattern.

parameters.name: MaxLength
parameters.description: HTML maxlength on the input plus the limit shown in the counter. When null and ShowCount is true, only the current length is rendered.

parameters.name: CountFormat
parameters.description: Optional custom counter formatter (e.g. c => $"{c} of 60 chars"). Default renders 42 or 42/60 when MaxLength is set.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the underlying <input> on first render. The HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM because the browser's autofocus algorithm runs during initial document parsing — at parse time the WASM runtime hasn't booted yet and no <input> exists for it to focus. This parameter uses ElementReference.FocusAsync in OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender) which is the canonical workaround.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual / semantic input variant. Default is the plain text input. Search auto-renders a search icon prefix, sets type="search" (gives platforms a clear-button + IME hints), and applies a search-friendly minimum width so the field doesn't collapse in narrow flex containers — replaces the min-w-[180px] max-w-md + manual icon prefix consumers previously shipped at every search field call-site.

examples.title: With Binding
examples.code:
<Input Value="@_name" OnInput="@(e => _name = e.Value?.ToString() ?? "")" placeholder="Enter your name" />
<Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Value: @_name</Lumeo.Text>

@code {
    private string _name = "";
}

mdSummary:
# Input

Styled text input with label, prefix/suffix, icons, error state.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/input

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Input | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Input | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Input | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| Input | OnInput | `EventCallback<ChangeEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| Input | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Input | Prefix | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Input | Suffix | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Input | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| Input | Density | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Input | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Input | Clearable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Input | OnClear | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| Input | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Input | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Input | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Input | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Input | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Input | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Input | ShowCount | `bool` | `` | Renders a character counter below the input, matching Textarea's pattern. |
| Input | MaxLength | `int?` | `` | HTML maxlength on the input plus the limit shown in the counter. When null and ShowCount is true, only the current length is rendered. |
| Input | CountFormat | `Func<int, string>?` | `` | Optional custom counter formatter (e.g. c => $"{c} of 60 chars"). Default renders 42 or 42/60 when MaxLength is set. |
| Input | AutoFocus | `bool` | `` | Focuses the underlying <input> on first render. The HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM because the browser's autofocus algorithm runs during initial document parsing — at parse time the WASM runtime hasn't booted yet and no <input> exists for it to focus. This parameter uses ElementReference.FocusAsync in OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender) which is the canonical workaround. |
| Input | Variant | `InputVariant` | `InputVariant.Default` | Visual / semantic input variant. Default is the plain text input. Search auto-renders a search icon prefix, sets type="search" (gives platforms a clear-button + IME hints), and applies a search-friendly minimum width so the field doesn't collapse in narrow flex containers — replaces the min-w-[180px] max-w-md + manual icon prefix consumers previously shipped at every search field call-site. |
| Input | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Input | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `Prefix` (Input) — RenderFragment slot
- `Suffix` (Input) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `OnInput` (`EventCallback<ChangeEventArgs>`)
- `OnClear` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Input />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Input/Input.razor`
